steps: Wash a full set of sections (6-8 sections) in a well in PBS, 5 min × 3.
Incubate sections in 1% H 2 O 2 ( 1 mL 30% H 2 O 2 in 29 mL TBST), 00:30:00 at Room temperature .
Block sections in 5% NGS/TBST, 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Incubate sections in rabbit anti-TH (#SA-497), 1:3000 in TBST, 4 °C Overnight .
Incubate sections in anti-rabbit biotinylated (#OS03B), 1:3000, 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Prepare ABC (Avidin-Biotin-Complex, Vectastain ABC Kit, # PK-6100): 1 drop A and 1 drop B in 2.5 mL TBST, at least 30 min before use.
Incubate sections in ABC, 00:30:00 at Room temperature .
Prepare DAB solution (Sigma FAST, DAB Peroxidase Substrate Tablet Set), 1 DAB and 1 Urea Hydogen Peroxide tablet in 15 mL distilled water.
Mount the sections on positive charged plus slides.
Wash a full set of sections (6-8 sections) in a well in PBS, 00:05:00 (wash 1/3) (if stored in cryoprotective solution).
Wash a full set of sections (6-8 sections) in a well in PBS, 00:05:00 (wash 2/3) (if stored in cryoprotective solution).
Wash a full set of sections (6-8 sections) in a well in PBS, 00:05:00 (wash 3/3) (if stored in cryoprotective solution).
